text: Being here, I am struck by the convergence of technology and knowledge. The clean, modern space reflects both anticipation and curiosity within me. The transparent glass, the glow of digital screens, the precise lettering "R+D"—all invite me to contemplate the nature of progress, the blending of inquiry and creation. As I observe the exhibits, I sense a quiet awe and a desire to participate in this ongoing dialogue between human thought and technological evolution.
